summary: Completed testing of X-CLEAN car wash management system bug fixes. All 7 reported bugs have been verified as FIXED. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Services endpoint returns valid data
Backend: Workers endpoint returns workers (created 2 test workers)
Backend: POST /api/jobs creates job AND corresponding booking (booking_id returned)
Backend: Job-created booking appears in GET /api/bookings (Calendar endpoint)
Backend: Customer history (GET /api/customers/{id}) shows job in 'jobs' array
Backend: PUT /api/jobs/{id} with status='kesz' syncs status to booking
Backend: GET /api/stats/dashboard counts completed job correctly (today_cars, today_cash)
Backend: PUT /api/jobs/{id} with price change syncs to booking
Backend: PUT /api/jobs/{id} with worker change syncs to booking
Backend: /api/services/pricing-data returns valid price_matrix for S,M,L,XL,XXL
Frontend: BookingPage SVG car icons use outline style (fill='none', stroke='currentColor')
Frontend: BookingPage has pb-20 padding (80px) - Tovább button not obscured
Frontend: Dashboard shows correct KPI stats (1 car, 15,000 Ft cash)
Frontend: Calendar shows job-created booking (TST999 with green 'Kész' status)
Frontend: Customer detail page shows job in 'Előzmények' section
Frontend: Statistics page shows correct data (1 car, 15,000 Ft, Debrecen)

bugs_verified_fixed.evidence: Customer detail page shows 'Előzmények' section with job: S - Külső Eco, Kész, 15,000 Ft

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: 2. Dashboard job not appearing in Calendar
bugs_verified_fixed.evidence: POST /api/jobs returns booking_id, booking appears in GET /api/bookings

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: 3. Job status not syncing to booking
bugs_verified_fixed.evidence: PUT /api/jobs with status='kesz' updates booking status to 'kesz'
GET /api/stats/dashboard returns today_cars=1, today_cash=15000 after completing job

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: 5. BookingPage car size icons not outline style
6. Tovább button obscured by Made with Emergent badge
bugs_verified_fixed.evidence: Container has pb-20 class (80px padding), button fully visible

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: 7. Price/worker/service changes not propagating to booking
bugs_verified_fixed.evidence: PUT /api/jobs with price/worker_id updates syncs to booking collection

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test workers (TEST_Worker_1, TEST_Worker_2) for testing. Created test customer and job during pytest run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified all 7 bug fixes are working correctly. Key changes tested: 1) POST /api/jobs now creates booking and returns booking_id, 2) GET /api/customers/{id} returns jobs array with customer history, 3) PUT /api/jobs syncs status/price/worker to linked booking, 4) GET /api/stats/dashboard uses regex date matching for accurate counts, 5) BookingPage SVG icons are stroke-based outlines, 6) BookingPage has pb-20 padding. Test workers created: wrk_0fa6891d1a12 (TEST_Worker_1), wrk_304b3ab43fb1 (TEST_Worker_2).

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS notifications via Twilio are mocked
